name: test-run-user-scenarios
default_program:
[stages: preflight>detect>analyze>review>handoff>audit |
 scope: repo|paths(glob,...) |
 policy: evidence,deterministic-output |
 lens: kahneman-tversky |
 output: md(contract=v1)]

required_inputs.name: SYSTEM_UNDER_TEST
required_inputs.description: Which framework surface is being exercised.

required_inputs.name: PRIMARY_USERS
required_inputs.description: Realistic user or agent personas and the job each one is trying to finish.

required_inputs.name: SCENARIO_COUNT
required_inputs.description: Target number of scenarios to generate and run. Default to 6 when omitted.

required_inputs.name: FAILURE_CLASSES
required_inputs.description: Failure or misuse classes to force into the scenario set.

required_inputs.name: KNOWN_CONSTRAINTS
required_inputs.description: Scope, release, or realism constraints for the scenario run.
